text: P0 complete. Implemented: MutableVec[A]/MutableDVec tier (DVec lost in-place mutators, gained mutableCopy; asVec/toVec discipline); LinearOperator.applyTo(Vec, MutableVec)->Either with DoubleLinearOperator primitive overload; Either-first facade (lu/cholesky/solve/leastSquares/conditionEstimate/det return Either, try* deleted, orThrow extension added — PRD thesis snippet A.solve(b).orThrow compiles and is tested in LUSuite); RowIndex/ColIndex and Layout enum deleted, DMat gains isContiguousRowMajor/ColMajor predicates. Sparse kernels now hoist destination data/offset/stride (strided-destination correctness lands with P1 tests). Evidence: sbt testAll 49/49 JVM+JS, benchCompile green.
